ddls:
CREATE TABLE "batteries" (
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battery */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the battery */,
  "manufacture_date" TEXT /* Date the battery was manufactured */,
  "design_capacity" REAL /* Design capacity of the battery in Ah */,
  "nominal_voltage" REAL /* Nominal voltage of the battery in V */,
  "cell_count" INTEGER /* Number of cells in the battery */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the battery */,
  "production_line" TEXT /* Production line where the battery was manufactured */,
  "quality_status" TEXT /* Current quality status */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last quality inspection */,
  "warranty_expiration_date" TEXT /* Warranty expiration date */,
  "location" TEXT /* Current location of the battery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("battery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battery_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the battery the data belongs to */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the data point in seconds */,
  "voltage_v" REAL /* Voltage of the battery in V */,
  "voltage_filtered_v" REAL /* Filtered voltage of the battery in V */,
  "current_a" REAL /* Current of the battery in A */,
  "current_filtered_a" REAL /* Filtered current of the battery in A */,
  "current_average_a" REAL /* Average current of the battery in A */,
  "discharged_mah" REAL /* Discharged capacity of the battery in mAh */,
  "remaining" REAL /* Remaining capacity of the battery as a percentage */,
  "scale" INTEGER /* Scale factor for the data */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the battery in C */,
  "is_powering_off" INTEGER /* Whether the battery is powering off */,
  "warning" INTEGER /* Warning flags for the battery */,
  "charge_cycles" INTEGER /* Number of charge cycles the battery has undergone */,
  "cycle_charge_time" INTEGER /* Total time spent in charging cycles */,
  "cycle_discharge_time" INTEGER /* Total time spent in discharging cycles */,
  "max_temperature" REAL /* Maximum temperature recorded */,
  "min_temperature" REAL /* Minimum temperature recorded */,
  "average_temperature" REAL /* Average temperature over the data collection period */,
  "cycle_count" INTEGER /* Number of complete charge-discharge cycles */,
  "cycle_degradation" REAL /* Degradation rate of the battery over cycles */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last update time of the data */,
  "software_version" TEXT /* Version of the software or firmware used to collect data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battery_data_battery_id FOREIGN KEY ("battery_id") REFERENCES batteries ("battery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cells" (
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cell */,
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the battery the cell belongs to */,
  "cell_number" INTEGER /* Number of the cell in the battery */,
  "cell_type" TEXT /* Type of cell */,
  "cell_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the cell */,
  "cell_model" TEXT /* Model number of the cell */,
  "cell_capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the cell in Ah */,
  "cell_nominal_voltage" REAL /* Nominal voltage of the cell in V */,
  "cell_production_date" TEXT /* Date the cell was manufactured */,
  "cell_quality_status" TEXT /* Current quality status of the cell */,
  "cell_warranty_expiration_date" TEXT /* Warranty expiration date of the cell */,
  "cell_location" TEXT /* Current location of the cell */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cell_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cells_battery_id FOREIGN KEY ("battery_id") REFERENCES batteries ("battery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cell_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cell the data belongs to */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the data point in seconds */,
  "voltage_v" REAL /* Voltage of the cell in V */,
  "charge_state" TEXT /* State of charge */,
  "internal_resistance" REAL /* Internal resistance of the cell in Ohms */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the cell in C */,
  "voltage_filtered" REAL /* Filtered voltage of the cell in V */,
  "current" REAL /* Current of the cell in A */,
  "current_filtered" REAL /* Filtered current of the cell in A */,
  "discharged_capacity" REAL /* Discharged capacity of the cell in mAh */,
  "remaining_capacity" REAL /* Remaining capacity of the cell as a percentage */,
  "cycle_count" INTEGER /* Number of complete charge-discharge cycles the cell has undergone */,
  "max_temperature" REAL /* Maximum temperature recorded for the cell */,
  "min_temperature" REAL /* Minimum temperature recorded for the cell */,
  "average_temperature" REAL /* Average temperature over the data collection period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cell_data_cell_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_id") REFERENCES cells ("cell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "max_cell_voltage_delta" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the battery the data belongs to */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the data point in seconds */,
  "max_cell_voltage_delta" REAL /* Maximum cell voltage delta in V */,
  "max_voltage_cell_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cell with the maximum voltage */,
  "min_voltage_cell_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cell with the minimum voltage */,
  "voltage_difference" REAL /* Difference in voltage between the cells */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_max_cell_voltage_delta_battery_id FOREIGN KEY ("battery_id") REFERENCES batteries ("battery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "average_power" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the battery the data belongs to */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the data point in seconds */,
  "average_power" REAL /* Average power of the battery in W */,
  "max_power" REAL /* Maximum power recorded */,
  "min_power" REAL /* Minimum power recorded */,
  "power_variance" REAL /* Variance in power over the data collection period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_average_power_battery_id FOREIGN KEY ("battery_id") REFERENCES batteries ("battery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "available_energy" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the battery the data belongs to */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the data point in seconds */,
  "available_energy" REAL /* Available energy of the battery in Wh */,
  "max_energy" REAL /* Maximum available energy recorded */,
  "min_energy" REAL /* Minimum available energy recorded */,
  "energy_variance" REAL /* Variance in available energy over the data collection period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_available_energy_battery_id FOREIGN KEY ("battery_id") REFERENCES batteries ("battery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "remaining_capacity" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the battery the data belongs to */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the data point in seconds */,
  "remaining_capacity" REAL /* Remaining capacity of the battery as a percentage */,
  "max_capacity" REAL /* Maximum remaining capacity recorded */,
  "min_capacity" REAL /* Minimum remaining capacity recorded */,
  "capacity_variance" REAL /* Variance in remaining capacity over the data collection period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_remaining_capacity_battery_id FOREIGN KEY ("battery_id") REFERENCES batteries ("battery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "design_capacity" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the battery the data belongs to */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the data point in seconds */,
  "design_capacity" REAL /* Design capacity of the battery in Ah */,
  "actual_capacity" REAL /* Actual capacity of the battery in Ah */,
  "capacity_variance" REAL /* Variance in actual capacity from design capacity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_capacity_battery_id FOREIGN KEY ("battery_id") REFERENCES batteries ("battery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nominal_voltage" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the battery the data belongs to */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the data point in seconds */,
  "nominal_voltage" REAL /* Nominal voltage of the battery in V */,
  "actual_voltage" REAL /* Actual nominal voltage of the battery in V */,
  "voltage_variance" REAL /* Variance in actual voltage from nominal voltage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nominal_voltage_battery_id FOREIGN KEY ("battery_id") REFERENCES batteries ("battery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, technician) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
